name: reliq-context-engine
description: Task-scoped context building, retrieval, and prompt generation for Reliq and other AI systems.

interface.longDescription: Builds minimal structured context from wiki knowledge, optional FAISS retrieval, and shared memory so agents can work without chat-history prompt stuffing.
defaultPrompt: Build context for this implementation task.
Search memory relevant to this debugging issue.
Generate a deterministic prompt for this feature request.
